x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_self_service_issue_config"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " DEX self-service issue configurations"; if (count >= 5) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " self-service configurations found. Employees can use AI-guided workflows to self-diagnose and resolve common device issues." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " self-service configuration(s) found (target: 5+). Configure additional issue types to maximize AI-guided employee deflection." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No DEX self-service issue configurations found. Employees cannot use AI-guided self-service workflows." }; }})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure DEX self-service issue definitions via dex_self_service_issue_config_list.do. Self-service configurations enable employees to diagnose and resolve their own device issues using AI-guided workflows — a key deflection capability that reduces service desk volume.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.]]></ai_justification><check_name>DEX Self-Service Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_self_service_issue_config"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " DEX self-service issue configurations"; if (count >= 5) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " self-service configurations found. Employees can use AI-guided workflows to self-diagnose and resolve common device issues." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " self-service configuration(s) found (target: 5+). Configure additional issue types to maximize AI-guided employee deflection." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No DEX self-service issue configurations found. Employees cannot use AI-guided self-service workflows." }; }})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>DEX</module><number>CHK0000517</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Configure DEX self-service issue definitions via dex_self_service_issue_config_list.do. Self-service configurations enable employees to diagnose and resolve their own device issues using AI-guided workflows — a key deflection capability that reduces service desk volume.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>DEX Self-Service Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c74</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
